---
title: "Travel flow aggregation: Nationally scalable methods for interactive and online visualisation of transport behaviour at the road network level"
description: "Malcolm Morgan and Robin Lovelace (2020). Travel flow aggregation: Nationally scalable methods for interactive and online visualisation of transport behaviour at the road network level. *Environment & Planning B: Planning & Design*. https://doi.org/10.1177/2399808320942779"
date: "2020-07-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "morgan_travel_2020"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Environment & Planning B: Planning & Design"
doi: "10.1177/2399808320942779"
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Malcolm Morgan"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Environment & Planning B: Planning & Design
**Year:** 2020

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1177/2399808320942779) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Malcolm Morgan and Robin Lovelace (2020). Travel flow aggregation: Nationally scalable methods for interactive and online visualisation of transport behaviour at the road network level. *Environment & Planning B: Planning & Design*. https://doi.org/10.1177/2399808320942779

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{morgan_travel_2020,
  ids = {morgan_travel_2020a},
  title = {Travel Flow Aggregation: Nationally Scalable Methods for Interactive and Online Visualisation of Transport Behaviour at the Road Network Level},
  author = {Morgan, Malcolm and Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2020},
  month = jul,
  journal = {Environment \& Planning B: Planning \& Design},
  publisher = {{SAGE PublicationsSage UK: London, England}},
  doi = {10.1177/2399808320942779},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/PFJBTCV8/Morgan and Lovelace - 2020 - Travel flow aggregation Nationally scalable metho.pdf;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/3MAT8X6H/2399808320942779.html}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
